title: Lookup project by phone number and start submission
description: Verifies that entering a valid Spanish mobile number routes the customer to their project and lands on the next required section for that project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill +34612345678 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify the user is redirected into a project flow identified by a code in the URL
Verify the project flow displays the next required step for the project

title: Sign all required representation documents and proceed
description: Verifies the customer can inject a signature, enable continue, and proceed past representation signing to the next section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a signature into the signature canvas
Click the continue control for representation signing
Verify the user proceeds to the next section after representation signing

title: Assessor logs in and views project list
description: Verifies an assessor can log in to the dashboard with the correct password and see the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Verify the dashboard displays a list of projects

title: Submit a completed project from review to success screen
description: Verifies the customer can submit from the review checklist and reach the success confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Click the submit control on the review section
Verify the success confirmation screen is displayed

title: Assessor initiates a ZIP download for a project
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading a ZIP for a selected project from the dashboard UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project detail from the project list
Initiate the project ZIP download
Verify a ZIP download action is initiated from the project detail UI

title: Complete the 4-step energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies the customer can complete all four steps of the energy certificate survey and proceed to the review section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill valid values into the housing data fields
Click the next control to advance to openings
Fill valid values into the openings fields
Click the next control to advance to thermal systems
Fill valid values into the thermal systems fields
Click the next control to advance to additional info
Select valid values for product sold and existing-customer status
Click the confirm control to complete the survey
Verify the user proceeds to the review section after confirming the energy certificate survey

title: Skip the energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies the customer can skip the entire energy certificate survey and proceed to the review section marked as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click the control to skip the energy certificate survey
Verify the user proceeds to the review section with the energy certificate marked as skipped

title: Assessor opens a project and reviews documents and extracted data
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project detail modal from the dashboard list and see uploaded assets and extracted data.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project detail from the project list
Verify the project detail modal is visible
Verify the project detail modal displays uploaded assets and extracted data

title: Upload required property documents and continue to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload identity, IBI, and electricity bill documents and proceed to province selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image using the identity document upload control
Upload a valid IBI document using the IBI upload control
Upload at least one electricity bill page using the electricity bill upload control
Click property-docs-continue-btn
Verify the flow advances to the province selection step
Verify province selection options or a detected province are displayed

title: Review checklist lets user return to fix an incomplete item and then submit
description: Verifies the customer can navigate from review to fix an incomplete item, return to review, and then submit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Fill a valid file into the DNI front upload input
Fill a valid file into the DNI back upload input
Fill a valid file into the IBI upload input
Fill valid files into the electricity bill upload input to represent a multi-page bill
Click the control to continue from property document upload
Select a valid province option
Click the control to continue from province selection
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a signature into the signature canvas
Click the continue control for representation signing
Click the control to skip the energy certificate survey if it is shown
Click the submit control on the review section
Verify the success confirmation screen is displayed

title: Defer representation signing and proceed
description: Verifies the customer can defer representation signing and continue to the next section without applying signatures.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the option to defer representation signing
Verify the user proceeds to the next section without completing representation signatures

title: Select Cataluña and continue to representation signing
description: Verifies that selecting Cataluña as the province confirms the selection and advances the user to the representation signing step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
If province selection is available, click select-province-btn to open the list
Click province-btn-cataluna
Click province-continue-btn
Verify the flow advances to the representation signing step
Verify a signature input area is displayed

title: Block continue until DNI back is provided when front-only is detected
description: Verifies that when a front-only identity upload is detected, the user is prevented from continuing until the DNI back image is uploaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload a front-only DNI image using the identity document upload control
Click property-docs-continue-btn
Verify a validation error indicates the DNI back is required
Upload a valid DNI back image using the identity document back-side upload control
Click property-docs-continue-btn
Verify the flow advances to the province selection step

title: Assessor exports the project list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can trigger a CSV export from the dashboard after logging in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Trigger the CSV export from the dashboard
Verify a CSV export action is initiated from the dashboard UI

title: Prevent continuing without a signature
description: Verifies the customer cannot continue from representation signing until a signature is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Verify the continue control for representation signing is disabled

title: Hide submit on review when checklist is incomplete
description: Verifies the review section does not allow submission when required checklist items are not completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Verify the submit control is not available on the review section when requirements are incomplete

title: Signature injection reflects signed state in the UI
description: Verifies that injecting a test signature updates the signature state so the UI reflects a signature is present.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a signature into the signature canvas
Verify the signature canvas indicates a signature is present

title: Assessor initiates an individual asset download
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading an individual asset from the project detail modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project detail from the project list
Initiate download for an individual asset
Verify an individual asset download action is initiated from the project detail UI

title: Energy certificate step navigation supports back and preserves entered values
description: Verifies the customer can move forward a step and back again in the energy certificate survey without losing entered data.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill valid values into the housing data fields
Click the next control to advance to openings
Click the back control to return to housing
Verify the previously entered housing values are still present

title: Block advancing energy certificate when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the customer cannot advance from step 1 of the energy certificate survey until required fields are completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click the next control to advance to openings
Verify a field-level validation error is visible for the incomplete required inputs

title: Select Madrid then navigate back to property documents
description: Verifies that selecting Madrid advances to representation and the back action returns the user to the property documents step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
If province selection is available, click select-province-btn to open the list
Click province-btn-madrid
Click province-continue-btn
Click the back control for the province/representation step using province-back-btn
Verify the flow returns to the property documents step
Verify the property document upload section is displayed

title: Back navigation returns to the previous section from representation
description: Verifies the customer can use back navigation from representation signing to return to the prior section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the back control for representation signing
Verify the user lands on the previous section in the submission flow

title: Assessor opens an asset preview in a new tab
description: Verifies an assessor can open an individual uploaded asset preview from the project detail modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project detail from the project list
Click the action to view an asset preview
Verify an asset preview view is opened

title: Assessor logs out and returns to dashboard login screen
description: Verifies an assessor can log out from the dashboard and is returned to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the dashboard login form
Log out from the dashboard
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Proceed when province is auto-detected
description: Verifies that when a province is already auto-detected, the user can continue without opening the selection list.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
If a province confirmation chip is shown, proceed without opening province selection
Click province-continue-btn
Verify the flow advances to the representation signing step
Verify a signature input area is displayed

title: Show error when phone number is not found
description: Verifies that entering a phone number not associated with any project shows a not-found error and does not advance into a project flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill +34600000000 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify a not-found error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the phone entry step
